meta.title: PoGoTeams – PvP Team Builder for Pokémon GO
meta.description: Build winning teams for Pokémon GO Battle League. Automatic team building, lead gameplans, and matchup analysis. Free app for iOS and Android.
meta.keywords: Pokemon GO, PvP, team builder, battle league, GBL, Pokemon GO PvP, team building, lead gameplan, matchup analysis, Pokemon GO app
meta.ogTitle: PoGoTeams – PvP Team Builder for Pokémon GO
meta.ogDescription: Build winning teams for Pokémon GO Battle League with automatic team building and strategic lead gameplans.

structuredData.appDescription: Build winning teams for Pokémon GO Battle League. Automatic team building, lead gameplans, and matchup analysis.
structuredData.siteDescription: PvP Team Builder for Pokémon GO Battle League

hero.subtitle: Build PvP teams using structured team-building rules from high-level play. Plan your leads with matchup logic, not guesswork. Climb the ranks with a real competitive edge.

features.sectionSubtitle: Apply proven team-building concepts and structured decision rules used in high-level Pokémon GO PvP.

teamBuilding.title: Automatic Team Building
teamBuilding.description: Generate teams using structured rules commonly applied in high-level PvP: role balance, coverage, and safe switches.
items: Build teams from the Pokémon you own
Build around any Pokémon and get a team that works
Use recorded opponents to detect common picks and cores
Generate teams designed to answer the meta you encounter

leadGameplans.title: Lead Gameplans
leadGameplans.description: Plan your opening matchups using structured decision rules. No more guessing what to do at the start of a battle.
items: Know when to stay in a matchup or switch out
Learn when to commit shields and when to preserve them
Get catch and bait suggestions where they matter
See how matchups change across different shield scenarios

customMovesets.title: Custom Movesets
customMovesets.description: Define the exact movesets you run and get accurate analysis everywhere: team building, scoring, and battle simulations all account for your actual moves.
items: Add moveset variants to any Pokémon in the rankings
Multiple variants are tested automatically to find the best fit
Compare how different movesets perform side by side
Full battle simulation for every non-standard moveset
customMovesets.linkText: Learn how to use Custom Movesets →

rankings.title: Pokémon Rankings
rankings.description: See how Pokémon perform across cups and roles. Mark the ones you own. Your collection becomes the foundation for automatic team building.
items: Browse rankings by cup and by role
Mark owned Pokémon once, use them across all leagues and cups
See recommended movesets for every ranked Pokémon
Search by name, moves, or typing to find what you need

matchupAnalysis.title: Matchup Analysis
matchupAnalysis.description: Evaluate teams using well-known PvP metrics: coverage, consistency, bulk, and safety.
items: Matchup breakdowns vs popular picks and recorded opponents
Identify the most dangerous matchups for each team
Guided manual team builder with rule-based suggestions

testimonials.title: What trainers are saying
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from Reddit community and app store reviews.

whatsNew.title: What's New
whatsNew.subtitle: Latest updates, guides, and PvP tips.

items.question: Is the app free?
items.answer: Yes! Free to use with ads. You can remove them permanently with a small one-time purchase.

items.question: Is the app available on Android?
items.answer: Yes! Available on iOS, Mac, and Android. Download it from the App Store or Google Play.

items.question: Can I import Pokémon directly from the game?
items.answer: No — for your account's safety. Pokémon GO's API is protected and third-party connections could result in a ban.

items.question: Do I have to enter my Pokémon every time?
items.answer: No. You select them once and they're saved across all leagues and cups.

items.question: What is "Lead Gameplan"?
items.answer: For every saved team, you can view short, matchup-specific guides on how to play your lead against common opposing Pokémon.

cta.title: Ready to stop guessing and start winning?
cta.subtitle: Build smarter teams. Plan your leads. Climb the ranks.

footer.disclaimerLine1: PoGoTeams is a companion planning tool and does not connect to Pokémon GO directly.
footer.disclaimerLine2: Pokémon GO is a trademark of Niantic, Inc. This app is not affiliated with or endorsed by Niantic.
